creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Looks like this is fixed by:

r407537 | miwi | 2016-01-30 13:30:40 -0500 (Sat, 30 Jan 2016) | 14 lines

Welcome Centos 6.7

- Upgrade all linux-c6- to CentOS 6.7
- Cleanups

PR:                     205846
Submitted by:           xmj
In Collaboration with:  allanjude, netchild, xmj
Exp-run:                antoine
Sponsored by:           Perceivon Hosting Inc.
Differential Revision:  D3428

We'd like to thanks for all the feedback and comments.
------------------------------------------------------------------------

and subsequent:

r407604 | miwi | 2016-01-31 05:00:14 -0500 (Sun, 31 Jan 2016) | 5 lines

- Fix x11/linux-c6-xorg-libs entry as fixed
- Also fix modify date

Reported by: Terry Kennedy <TERRY@glaver.org>
